stemHtml: EGNOS (European Geostationary Navigation Overlay System) informs the users of any GPS malfunctions within 6 seconds to enhance safety. How are these malfunctions broadcast to EGNOS users?

options.a: Alerts are sent to all the satellites in view and then re-transmitted to the user.
options.b: Differential corrections and integrity messages are broadcast every 3 hours.
options.d: The data are broadcast from all satellites with navigation packages.
